data.title: FEDERAL HOME LOAN BANK OF BOSTON ANNOUNCES 2026 FIRST QUARTER RESULTS, DECLARES DIVIDEND
data.description: In Boston on April 24, 2026, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Boston disclosed its initial unaudited financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026, revealing a net profit of $44.3 million. The bank anticipates submitting its Form 10-Q quarterly report for the mentioned period soon.

data.title: These Analysts Revise Their Forecasts On Boyd Gaming After Q1 Results
data.description: Boyd Gaming Corp (NYSE: BYD) released their first-quarter financial results, which revealed earnings of $1.60 per share, falling short of the predicted $1.73 per share. The company's quarterly sales stood at $997.355 million, missing the anticipated $1.000 billion mark. The company also approved a $500 million buyback plan. Keith Smith, President and CEO of Boyd Gaming, highlighted that the results showcase the advantages of their diverse business model, operational efficiencies, and consistent capital investments. Property-level performance demonstrated year-over-year revenue growth and Adjusted EBITDAR improvement, with property margins exceeding 39%. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FirstCash Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
data.description: Firstcash Holdings Inc, listed on NASDAQ as FCFS, reported strong earnings in the first quarter of the fiscal year. The company surpassed analyst expectations by earning $2.69 per share in the quarter, compared to the estimated $2.31 per share. Additionally, Firstcash reported quarterly sales of $1.052 billion, surpassing the estimated $1.003 billion in sales. CEO Rick Wessel expressed satisfaction with the results, noting record revenue, net income, and earnings per share. The company's consolidated revenues saw a notable 26% increase compared to the same quarter last year, exceeding $1 billion.

data.title: Newrez Paves the Way for VantageScore 4.0 Adoption in the U.S. Mortgage Market
data.description: In Fort Washington, Pennsylvania, Newrez, one of the top five mortgage lenders and servicers, acknowledged the significance of its close collaboration with Freddie Mac in facilitating the U.S. Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA), Freddie Mac, and Fannie Mae in advancing the industry's adoption of updated credit scoring systems. Through a constrained loan delivery project with Freddie Mac, Newrez contributed to confirming that VantageScore® 4.0 was viable for origination, underwriting, pricing, and submission to a Government-Sponsored Enterprise (GSE). This collaboration underscores Newrez's active involvement in this advancement.

data.title: These Analysts Increase Their Forecasts On Churchill Downs After Upbeat Q1 Results
data.description: Churchill Downs Inc (NASDAQ: CHDN) exceeded expectations in Q1 earnings, reporting $1.21 per share compared to the consensus estimate of $1.00 per share. Sales for the quarter were reported at $663.000 million, surpassing the estimated $662.185 million. Following this news, Churchill Downs shares rose by 3.2% to $101.06 on Friday. Analysts have adjusted their price targets for the company after the earnings report, with Citizens analyst Jordan Bender among those making changes. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
